addForeignKey.description: Foreign Key from "CUSTOMER REL(Hierarchy Code)" to "Rbo Hierarchy(Hierarchy Code)" (Restrict) [Virtual]
Foreign Key from "ADDRESS(CUST ROWID FK)" to "CUSTOMER(Rowid Object)" (Restrict) [Virtual]
Foreign Key from "CUSTOMER REL(FROM_ROWID)" to "CUSTOMER(Rowid Object)" (Restrict) [Virtual]
Foreign Key from "CUSTOMER REL(Relationship Type Code)" to "Rbo Rel Type(Relationship Type Code)" (Restrict) [Virtual]
Foreign Key from "CUSTOMER REL(TO_ROWID)" to "CUSTOMER(Rowid Object)" (Restrict) [Virtual]
Foreign Key from "CUSTOMER(MDM CUST TYPE)" to "LKP CUST TYPE(CUST TYPE CD)" (Restrict) [Virtual]
Foreign Key from "CUSTOMER(Base Object Class Code)" to "Rbo Bo Class(Base Object Class Code)" (Restrict) [Virtual]

functionParameter.description: CLP00044|This is the type of match to be executed. Use "ENTIRE" to compare items with the entire string, "WORD" to compare items with word in the inputs, and "ANYWHERE" to find the items anywhere in the input string. If this parameter is not set, the default is "ENTIRE".
functionParameter.name: searchType

functionParameter.description: CLP00045|This flag controls whether all occurrences of the cleanse list item will be replaced in the input, or if only the first occurrence will be replaced in the input. If this parameter is not set, the default is TRUE.
functionParameter.name: replaceAllOccurrences

functionParameter.description: CLP00031|This flag controls whether the match will be stripped instead of using the replace value. If this parameter is not set, the default is FALSE.
functionParameter.name: strip

functionParameter.description: CLP00197|This flag controls whether the other cleanse items should be processed once an item has been found in the input string. If this parameter is not set, the default is TRUE.
functionParameter.name: stopOnHit

functionParameter.description: CLP00044|This is the type of match to be executed. Use "ENTIRE" to compare items with the entire string, "WORD" to compare items with word in the inputs, and "ANYWHERE" to find the items anywhere in the input string. If this parameter is not set, the default is "ENTIRE".
functionParameter.name: searchType

functionParameter.description: CLP00045|This flag controls whether all occurrences of the cleanse list item will be replaced in the input, or if only the first occurrence will be replaced in the input. If this parameter is not set, the default is TRUE.
functionParameter.name: replaceAllOccurrences

functionParameter.description: CLP00031|This flag controls whether the match will be stripped instead of using the replace value. If this parameter is not set, the default is FALSE.
functionParameter.name: strip

functionParameter.description: CLP00197|This flag controls whether the other cleanse items should be processed once an item has been found in the input string. If this parameter is not set, the default is TRUE.
functionParameter.name: stopOnHit

function.description: CLF00008|Use this list to standarize states.
function.name: CL-States

function.name: MP_LOYALTY_CUSTOMER

addQuery.name: QRY_CUSTOMER_REL
addQuery.sql: SELECT C_CUSTOMER_REL.ROWID_OBJECT, C_CUSTOMER_REL.CREATOR, C_CUSTOMER_REL.CREATE_DATE, C_CUSTOMER_REL.UPDATED_BY, C_CUSTOMER_REL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, C_CUSTOMER_REL.DELETED_IND, C_CUSTOMER_REL.DELETED_BY, C_CUSTOMER_REL.DELETED_DATE, C_CUSTOMER_REL.INTERACTION_ID, C_CUSTOMER_REL.HUB_STATE_IND, C_CUSTOMER_REL.HIERARCHY_CODE, C_CUSTOMER_REL.REL_TYPE_CODE, C_CUSTOMER_REL.FROM_ROWID, C_CUSTOMER_REL.TO_ROWID FROM C_CUSTOMER_REL

addQuery.name: QRY_CUSTOMER_PROF
addQuery.sql: SELECT C_CUSTOMER.DELETED_IND, C_CUSTOMER.DELETED_DATE, C_CUSTOMER.DELETED_BY, C_CUSTOMER.HUB_STATE_IND, C_CUSTOMER.INTERACTION_ID, C_CUSTOMER.ROWID_OBJECT, C_CUSTOMER.UPDATED_BY, C_CUSTOMER.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, C_CUSTOMER.CREATOR, C_CUSTOMER.CREATE_DATE, C_CUSTOMER.PREFIX_1, C_CUSTOMER.FIRST_NAME, C_CUSTOMER.LAST_NAME, C_CUSTOMER.MIDDLE_NAME, C_CUSTOMER.FULL_NAME, C_CUSTOMER.ORG_NAME, C_CUSTOMER.MDM_CUST_TYPE, C_CUSTOMER.SUFFIX, C_CUSTOMER.BO_CLASS_CODE FROM C_CUSTOMER

addQuery.name: QRY_CUSTOMER_ACCT
addQuery.sql: SELECT C_CUSTOMER.DELETED_IND, C_CUSTOMER.DELETED_DATE, C_CUSTOMER.DELETED_BY, C_CUSTOMER.HUB_STATE_IND, C_CUSTOMER.INTERACTION_ID, C_CUSTOMER.ROWID_OBJECT, C_CUSTOMER.UPDATED_BY, C_CUSTOMER.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, C_CUSTOMER.CREATOR, C_CUSTOMER.CREATE_DATE, C_CUSTOMER.PREFIX_1, C_CUSTOMER.FIRST_NAME, C_CUSTOMER.LAST_NAME, C_CUSTOMER.MIDDLE_NAME, C_CUSTOMER.FULL_NAME, C_CUSTOMER.ORG_NAME, C_CUSTOMER.MDM_CUST_TYPE, C_CUSTOMER.SUFFIX, C_CUSTOMER.BO_CLASS_CODE FROM C_CUSTOMER
